items.name_en: Double F Monogram launches a new fashion statement Kan U bag, cleverly balancing functionality and modernity. Full bag relief design, both visually and tactilely super nice. Classic FF Logo buckle paired with exquisite retro metal details. Can be worn as a shoulder bag or crossbody, looking retro and steady.

items.name_cn:
Dove Grey
Iconic Peekaboo ISeeU Small Bag, full-grain leather, small hand-stitched, classic turn-lock on both sides. Suede lining in the same color, two compartments separated by hard partitions, interior pocket with button and vintage gold metal fittings. Bag comes with handle and adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. Dimensions 27*9.5*21cm
Style 327

items.name_cn:
Dumpling Bag in Stock!!️
Miss Caro Wine Palm Straw Series, feels so summery. Sky blue fabric paired with creamy white calfskin. Light colors look fresh and healing. Lucky for those who love shoulder bags. Small and simple shape, paired with classic oblique fabric and vintage gold letters. Stylish and exquisite. Super lightweight for personal use, full capacity to store daily items. Comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, can be worn elegantly over the shoulder or carried by hand
size:24*6.5*14cm

This Dopp Kit wash bag is crafted from fine-grain Taurillon Monogram leather, allowing you to carry toiletries and other personal items elegantly. The bag features a spacious capacity, double zipper closure, and a washable lining, combining style and practicality. This accessory makes a thoughtful gift and perfectly complements any travel bag.
Dimensions: 28 x 15 x 16.5 cm

items.name_en: Dynamic Chip M45256 Black M45306 Blue M46526 Milky White Top-tier Original M45307 Milky White with Brown Top-tier Original NéoNoé Medium Tote Bag Crafted from Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, it exudes elegance with leather drawstrings and delicate eyelets. The lightweight structure fits the body's rhythm, cleverly using a removable top handle or detachable and adjustable shoulder strap for a comfortable experience whether carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
items.name_cn:
Dynamic Chip M45256 Black M45306 Blue M46526 Milky White Top-tier Original M45307 Milky White with Brown Top-tier Original NéoNoé Medium Tote Bag Crafted from Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, it exudes elegance with leather drawstrings and delicate eyelets. The lightweight structure fits the body's rhythm, cleverly using a removable top handle or detachable and adjustable shoulder strap for a comfortable experience whether carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
